_comment: People joining the league next season who don't have a real Draft API entry yet (so they're not in managers.json). Listed here purely so they have a card to pick on the landing page ahead of their first season -- shown as a distinct 'Rookie' card, no stats, no real managerId. Once someone here actually joins the league and appears in managers.json for real, remove their entry here and add their colors/abbreviation to data/manager-profiles.json instead (this file is just a stand-in for that).
